name: Ancient Ruins
description: Crumbling stone archways rise from the earth, half-swallowed by ivy and time. A dark staircase descends into the hillside beneath the largest arch.
dialogueOnInteract: You descend the worn steps into cool darkness. The air smells of damp stone and forgotten centuries. Carvings on the walls depict a procession of knights bearing a radiant vessel — the Grail, perhaps. The passage continues deeper than your torchlight can reach.
